title: Better With Sway
description:
Adds back the first person view sway from beta 1.8 and every version after to Better than Adventure, a mod for beta 1.7.3.

Current BTA version: 7.1-pre2a
body:
Current BTA version: 7.1-pre2a

Adds back the first person arm sway animation to Better than Adventure. The effect of this can be seen when you move your mouse around, and can be tweaked in the options menu.
